name: Yellow Cake plc
description: Yellow Cake plc is a specialist company operating in the uranium sector, created to purchase and hold physical triuranium octoxide (U3O8). The company offers shareholders exposure to the uranium price through its long-term inventory of physical uranium, without the risks associated with exploration, development, mining, or processing. Yellow Cake has a strategic relationship with Kazatomprom, the world's largest uranium producer, which provides the company with the option to purchase substantial quantities of uranium annually. It is headquartered in Jersey and listed on the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange.
